@@ -973,742 +973,4 @@
 )%0A%7D%0A
-*/%0Apackage main%0A%0Aimport (%0A%09%22fmt%22%0A%09%22math/rand%22%0A)%0A%0Afunc ri(inf, sup int) float64 %7B%0A%09return float64(rand.Intn(sup-inf+1) + inf)%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc arvere(pen *Pen, dist float64) %7B%0A%09if dist %3C 10 %7B%0A%09%09if ri(0, 50) == 0 %7B%0A%09%09%09pen.SetRGB(255, 0, 0)%0A%09%09%09pen.FillCircle(10)%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%09return%0A%09%7D%0A%09ang_dir := ri(10, 40)%0A%09ang_esq := ri(10, 40)%0A%0A%09pen.SetLineWidth(dist / 5)%0A%09pen.SetRGB(0, 0, 0)%0A%09pen.Walk(dist)%0A%09pen.Right(ang_dir)%0A%09arvere(pen, dist*(ri(80, 85)/100))%0A%09pen.Left(ang_dir + ang_esq)%0A%09arvere(pen, dist*(ri(80, 85)/100))%0A%09pen.Right(ang_esq)%0A%09pen.SetRGB(0, 0, 0)%0A%09pen.Walk(-dist)%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc main() %7B%0A%09pen := NewPen(600, 500)%0A%09pen.SetHeading(90)%0A%09pen.SetPosition(300, 500)%0A%09arvere(pen, 80)%0A%09pen.SavePNG(%22tree.png%22)%0A%09fmt.Println(%22PNG file created successfully.%22)%0A%7D%0A

-*/%0Apackage main%0A%0Aimport (%0A%09%22fmt%22%0A%09%22math/rand%22%0A)%0A%0Afunc ri(inf, sup int) float64 %7B%0A%09return float64(rand.Intn(sup-inf+1) + inf)%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc embua(pen *Pen, dist float64) %7B%0A%09if dist %3C 1 %7B%0A%09%09return // acaba recursao%0A%09%7D%0A%09pen.SetLineWidth(dist / 30) // grossura da linha%0A%09pen.Walk(dist) // anda quatidade %0A%09dist *= 0.97%0A%09pen.Right(90) // gira em 90 graus%0A%09embua(pen, dist) // recursao%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc main() %7B%0A%09pen := NewPen(500, 500) // criar o tamanho da imagem%0A%09pen.SetRGB(134, 0, 0) // cor%0A%09pen.SetPosition(0, 0)// onde a caenta vai comecar%0A%09embua(pen, 500)%0A%0A%09pen.SavePNG(%22tree.png%22)%0A%09fmt.Println(%22PNG file created successfully.%22)%0A%7D%0A
